parameters.query: SELECT id as booking_id, status, gcal_event_id, created_at FROM bookings WHERE idempotency_key = $1::text LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO bookings (provider_id, service_id, start_time, end_time, idempotency_key, gcal_event_id, user_id, status, created_at) VALUES ($1::int, $2::int, $3::timestamp, $4::timestamp, $5::text, $6::text, $7::bigint, 'CONFIRMED', NOW()) RETURNING id;
